atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he was referred to you by his PCP due to abnormal lab work, specifically an immunoglobulin A level.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he doesn't really understand what that immunoglobulin A level means.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he had a recent physical exam.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he was screened for infections during the recent physical exam.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he tends to get frequent colds that linger for a long time.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's family owns a donut shop.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has been diagnosed with type two diabetes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking metformin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he had a recent international trip to Zambia.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he tried to donate blood in Zambia but was not qualified due to a history of immunodeficiency.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Labs show a low immunoglobulin A level.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The primary problem is a low immunoglobulin A level, potentially contributing to recurrent infections.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient also has type two diabetes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes additional blood work

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes antibody titers

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in one week

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports assessing response to metformin

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports monitoring for worsening symptoms

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports monitoring for new infections

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to inform healthcare providers of his IgA deficiency
